raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact contains an apparent tension between being training-free and later training a scoring head, so cleanup centrally involves checking internal argument consistency.","R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, flow, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around claims that depend on reported results or interpretation.","RX.2":"The artifact includes strong deployment and causality claims, so avoiding inflated or unsupported phrasing is active.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within cleanup responsibilities rather than performing new experiments, literature review, or substantive rewriting beyond the request.","RX.4":"Because the text describes deployability and cost-quality benefits, cleanup should avoid language that could mislead downstream users about system capabilities.","RX.5":"Changes should remain traceable to the provided artifact and not introduce unsupported provenance or external facts."}}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an apparent tension between being training-free and later training a scoring head, so cleanup centrally involves checking internal argument consistency.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, flow, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around claims that depend on reported results or interpretation.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact includes strong deployment and causality claims, so avoiding inflated or unsupported phrasing is active.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within cleanup responsibilities rather than performing new experiments, literature review, or substantive rewriting beyond the request.
rationale.RX.4: Because the text describes deployability and cost-quality benefits, cleanup should avoid language that could mislead downstream users about system capabilities.
rationale.RX.5: Changes should remain traceable to the provided artifact and not introduce unsupported provenance or external facts.
